name: Reinvent Technology Partners Z (SPAC)
description: Reinvent Technology Partners Z was a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed by LinkedIn co-founder Reid Hoffman and Zynga founder Mark Pincus. The company was established to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It focused on identifying and partnering with technology companies that possess high growth potential. In 2021, the company successfully completed a business combination with Hippo Enterprises Inc., a home insurance group, resulting in the company becoming a publicly traded entity under the ticker symbol HIPO.
